changes: Added CardsConfig struct with optional zellij_session field
Added parse_cards_config() function for JSON deserialization with error context
Added read_cards_config_file() for loading from disk
Added write_cards_config_file() for persisting to disk with directory creation
Added 5 comprehensive unit tests covering valid, empty, malformed, roundtrip, and field omission scenarios

patterns_discovered.description: All CardsConfig fields marked Option<T> with #[serde(default)] and #[serde(skip_serializing_if = "Option::is_none")] for clean JSON output and partial config merging capability
patterns_discovered.benefit: Allows future config evolution without breaking existing files

patterns_discovered.description: Consistent use of anyhow::Context trait to append operation context to errors (e.g., file path, operation type)
patterns_discovered.benefit: Clear debugging signal showing where failures occur in config lifecycle

patterns_discovered.description: parse_cards_config() explicitly handles empty/whitespace-only JSON strings by returning default()
patterns_discovered.benefit: Graceful degradation when .cards/config.json is missing or empty

patterns_discovered.description: serde_json::from_str() with inline schema documentation in error message
patterns_discovered.benefit: Type mismatches caught early with hint about expected structure

gotchas_discovered.description: Empty Option fields must use both #[serde(default)] and #[serde(skip_serializing_if = "Option::is_none")] to avoid writing null values to JSON
gotchas_discovered.impact: Without this, default CardsConfig would serialize to {"zellij_session": null} instead of {}

gotchas_discovered.description: Tests use tempfile::tempdir() which auto-cleans scope; no manual cleanup needed but path must be read before dir is dropped
gotchas_discovered.impact: Test design is clean; roundtrip_cards_config_file() must read before test function ends

gotchas_discovered.description: cards_config_path() uses .unwrap_or_else() fallback to "." when env::current_dir() fails
gotchas_discovered.impact: In detached pane contexts (Zellij ??), PATH lookup may fail; fallback ensures predictable behavior

discoveries.approach_summary: Implemented CardsConfig as a lightweight, extensible public API in bop-core with three read/write functions and four helper functions. Design prioritizes optional fields for schema evolution, contextual error messages for debuggability, and comprehensive test coverage. No breaking changes to existing crate API.

recommendations.recommendation: Add zellij_session validation function to reject non-identifier values (e.g., spaces, special chars) before writing to config
Consider adding CardsConfig::merge(other: &CardsConfig) method for composing configs from multiple sources (e.g., global + local)
Add doc comment examples showing typical .cards/config.json structure and bop init usage pattern
Add integration test in bop-cli/tests/ that calls parse_cards_config with files from a fixture directory to catch serde-related regressions
